hero.title: We build digital employees — not software.
hero.description: NEXAI, based in Crailsheim, builds intelligent AI agents that save companies time, cut costs and help them grow — planned individually and fully integrated.

mission.title: Technology that takes work off people's plates.
mission.body: Too many AI projects end as a gimmick. We build digital employees that hold up in real operations — reliable, secure and genuinely useful. Every solution is planned individually and tailored precisely to the company's processes. Our goal isn't to sell as many off-the-shelf products as possible, but to make businesses more successful for the long term through intelligent automation.

items.title: Outcomes over hype
items.description: We deliver measurable value, not buzzwords.

items.title: Bespoke over standard
items.description: Every solution is tailored precisely to your business.

items.title: Security first
items.description: Data protection, guardrails and traceability aren't an add-on.

items.title: Speed with substance
items.description: Fast to a first version — clean all the way to operations.

items.title: Honest advice
items.description: We'll also tell you when AI isn't the answer.

items.title: Partnership
items.description: We think long-term, not project by project.

team.title: The people behind NEXAI.
team.description: Founded and led by two managing directors with one clear mission: AI that genuinely works for businesses.
